channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Alex Ovechkin scores 887th goal to move within 8 of breaking Wayne Gretzky's record
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Alex Ovechkin shook off a rough start to this three-game California swing by scoring his 887th career goal Saturday against the San Jose Sharks to move within eight of breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: J.J. Spaun takes the lead at The Players Championship on windy day that wrecked rounds
item.description: PONTE VEDRA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — J.J. Spaun only had to look at the video boards around the TPC Sawgrass to appreciate the chaos going around him Saturday in The Players Championship.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Uzan scores 25 points, No. 2 Houston ramps up 'D' to beat Arizona 72-64 for the Big 12 tourney title
item.description: Milos Uzan poured in 25 points, Emanuel Sharpe added 17 and second-ranked Houston held on down the stretch for a 72-64 victory over Arizona in the Big 12 Tournament championship game Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NCAA's Gavitt: Duke, ACC tell selection committee Flagg will be available for March Madness
item.description: Top-ranked Duke and the Atlantic Coast Conference have informed the NCAA Tournament selection committee that freshman Cooper Flagg will be available for March Madness.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Clayton scores 22 as No. 4 Florida beats No. 5 Alabama 104-82 in SEC semis
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. scored 22 points, and No. 4 Florida pulled away from No. 5 Alabama for a 104-82 victory in the Southeastern Conference Tournament semifinals on Saturday. Alijah Martin and Will Richard each had 16 points for the Gators (29-4) in their fifth consecutive win.
item.dc:creator: JIM DIAMOND, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Draper knocks off 2-time defending champion Alcaraz to reach Indian Wells final
item.description: Jack Draper toppled two-time defending champion Carlos Alcaraz 6-1, 0-6, 6-4 on Saturday to reach the BNP Paribas Open final.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No. 8 Tennessee downs No. 3 Auburn 70-65 to reach SEC Tournament championship game
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Zakai Zeigler scored 20 points as No. 8 Tennessee held off regular-season champion and third-ranked Auburn 70-65 on Saturday to reach the Southeastern Conference Tournament championship for the first time since 2022.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UNLV fires coach Kevin Kruger, one of the program's links to its glory-day past
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Coach Kevin Kruger, who led UNLV to the Sweet 16 as the team's point guard in 2007 while playing for his father, Hall of Famer Lon Kruger, was fired by the Rebels on Saturday. Kruger went 76-55 in four seasons and failed to lead the Rebels to the NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tonje scores 32 as No. 18 Wisconsin tops No. 7 Michigan St. 77-74 in Big Ten semis
item.description: John Tonje scored 32 points and grabbed seven rebounds to help No. 18 Wisconsin beat No. 7 Michigan State 77-74 in the semifinals of the Big Ten Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Creighton-UConn Big East semifinal game ends in scuffle over windmill dunk in final seconds
item.description: Friday night's Big East semifinal between Creighton and UConn ended in a scuffle after a Bluejays player threw down a dunk in the final seconds
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Seattle scores three unanswered goals to beat Utah
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club could have taken a big step towards a potential playoff spot with a victory at Seattle Friday night, but the lowly Kraken scored three unanswered goals to pull out a 4-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Zuby Ejiofor much more than just most improved in record-setting performance for No. 6 St. John's
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Maybe most improved didn't really do Zuby Ejiofor justice. The junior forward delivered an overpowering performance Friday night for No. 6 St.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU gets shut down by #2 Houston, 74-54
item.description: KANSAS CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In the Big 12 Tournament quarterfinals, BYU scored 49 points in the first half against Iowa State. But in the semifinals against #2 Houston, BYU didn't eclipse the 49-point mark until there were three minutes left in the game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jourdan Lewis becomes latest former Cowboys player to voice frustration with team
item.description: Jacksonville Jaguars defensive back Jourdan Lewis said he experienced moments of frustration during his eight-year stint with the Dallas Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jessie Holmes says his dogs deserve all the credit for his 'magical' first Iditarod win
item.description: JUNEAU, Alaska (AP) — Bundled-up well wishers lined a street along the Bering Sea coastline in the early morning darkness Friday, cheering musher Jessie Holmes as he won Alaska's Iditarod Trail Sled Dog Race.
item.dc:creator: BECKY BOHRER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Min Woo Lee and Akshay Bhatia share lead at The Players as Justin Thomas ties course mark with 62
item.description: PONTE VEDRA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Min Woo Lee and Akshay Bhatia shared the lead at The Players Championship going into a weekend with strong wind in the forecast and the potential for a wide-open chase. That includes Justin Thomas, the biggest surprise Friday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago Fire plays Toronto in conference action
item.description: Chicago Fire (1-1-1) vs. Toronto FC (0-2-1) Toronto; Saturday, 2:30 p.m. EDT BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Toronto FC +105, Chicago +226, Draw +262; over/under is 2.5 goals BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Fire visit Toronto in Eastern Conference action.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa, Orlando line up to make pitch to bring Rays to their city
item.description: The development deal to build the Tampa Bay Rays a new stadium in St. Petersburg appears to be dead. Now, other groups are lining up to buy the team and take it to another city.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Lightning to be featured in animated game later this month
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning will air a real-time, animated broadcast for the team's game against the New York Islanders later this month.
item.dc:creator: Katlyn Fernandez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU pulls away from Utah for 8th straight win, 85-74
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team is rolling into the postseason. Dawson Baker scored 15 points and Richie Saunders added 14 to lead No. 23 BYU to an 85-74 victory over rival Utah on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Warriors star Stephen Curry reaches 25,000 career points
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry became the 26th player in NBA history to score 25,000 career points, reaching the milestone during the third quarter of the Golden State Warriors' 115-110 victory over the Detroit Pistons on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Giddey scores 26 to lead Bulls' comeback from 17 down to beat the Heat 114-109
item.description: Josh Giddey scored 26 points and the Chicago Bulls rallied from a 17-point, first-half deficit to beat the Miami Heat 114-109 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
